heading: Rules and regulations; administration and enforcement
label: 1043 Rules and regulations; administration and enforcement
text: The Secretary shall promulgate such rules and regulations as he deems necessary to carry out the purposes or provisions of this chapter, and shall be responsible for the administration and enforcement of this chapter except as otherwise provided in .section 1034(d) of this title
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter.
